{{CargoRelic
|name=Seal of the Ancients
|class_id=22455
|rank=Blue
|affct=FAITH
|birthday=01-01
|source=Lottery Machine No.3 (0.03%)
|description=On Jan 1, 1932 AD, the Seal of the Old God was discovered.<br>The Seal of the Old God is an ancient deity's symbol that requires a specific activation ritual and a suitable vessel for stabilization. This seal instills disgust and fear in evil creatures, making it a highly prized talisman for many.
|fame=24
|art=31
|fth=48
|civ=22
|tech=29
|ss1=All Sanctum Glorium Output +0.4%
|ss2=All Sanctum Glorium Output +0.8%
|ss3=All Sanctum Glorium Output +1.2%
|ss4=All Sanctum Glorium Output +2%
|ss7=All Sanctum Glorium Output +2%<br>All Sanctum Glorium Output +2% (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Frostsanctum skill I.png|50px]]Place in Frost Sanctum: Frost Sanctum, Glorium Output +5%
}}
